visual_description: A man in a dark suit and white gloves rides a bicycle on a paved road, leaning forward as he pedals. Two white jeeps follow behind him, approaching from the distance. The scene is set on a winding road with mountains and trees in the background under a clear sky.
audio_description: The audio clip begins with a burst of high-energy, distorted electric guitar, immediately joined by a driving drum beat and a punchy bass line, all rendered in a dense, compressed mix. The lead male vocalist, singing in a clear, energetic, and slightly raspy voice, delivers the lyric: "Messed up too with you." The vocal is centered in the stereo field, while the guitar and drums are spread wide, creating a full, immersive sound. The recording is marked by a persistent analog hiss and a low-frequency hum, suggesting a vintage or lo-fi production style. The overall fidelity is moderate, with a compressed dynamic range and a mid-heavy frequency profile, giving the music a gritty, raw character. As the music continues, the vocalist launches into a rapid, wordless vocal run—“Ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah-ah
